title: Cervical Neck Pillow, Ergonomic Memory Foam Pillows for Neck Pain Relief with Breathable Pillowcase, Contour Neck Support Pillow for Side Back Stomach Sleepers, Odorless
features: Ergonomic & Contoured Design: Say goodbye to sleepless nights with the new ergonomic FYOVA neck pillow, which features a US patent. FYOVA boasts a thickened neck contour, an enhanced hollow center, and a neck massage point. This design perfectly conforms to the natural curvature of your neck and shoulders, providing optimal support, stretching, and relaxation for your cervical spine.

Two Options of High Degree of Freedom: The FYOVA Pillow allows you to find the perfect level of support for your individual needs. FYOVA uses two different thicknesses for a custom feel. Simply rotate your pillow 180 degrees to enjoy a higher or lower contour!

High Quality Slow Rebound Memory Foam: Crafted from high-density, slow-rebound memory foam, this pillow gently conforms to your head and neck, providing adaptive support for all sleeping positions. The FYOVA pillow core is made of 100% breathable memory foam, which is nontoxic, odorless, and certified by OEKO-TEX, CertiPUR-US, and ISPA. Sleep soundly and stay dry all night!

Breathable Cooling Removable Pillowcase: The FYOVA Cervical neck pillow comes with a breathable cooling pillowcase made from ice silk fabric, delivering a cool and refreshing feel all night long. The pillowcase is removable and machine washable, making it easy to maintain and keep clean for a fresh and comfortable sleep experience.

Customer Satisfaction is Our Priority: At FYOVA, we not only provide high-quality cervical pillows but also offer dependable after-sales support. "Customer Satisfaction is Our Priority" is our core value. All our products come with a 6-month warranty. If you encounter any issues, don’t hesitate to contact us.
